_comment: Species: Spirit Fox (灵狐) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Fox

canonical.appearance: Elegant fox 1 m, fur shifts through spirit-colors, nine tails on ancient specimens
canonical.size: 1 m adult, 30 jin; ancient 3 m, 500 jin
canonical.behavior: Cunning predator; cultivates by absorbing illusion-essence; uses illusions to hunt
canonical.diet: spirit rabbits, spirit herbs, smaller beasts
canonical.relationships: Rival of spirit cranes; preyed upon by mountain lions
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_fox — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
